title: Arabic Mastery Programme
about: The first of its kind in Cape Town — a comprehensive two-year Arabic journey designed to give you a firm grasp of the Arabic language and its workings. We graduate students who can read, understand, and engage with the Qur'ān and classical texts with real confidence.
subjects: Nahw & I'rab — Grammar, context of words, the art of translation
Sarf — Morphology, creating words, mastering verbs and their meanings
Arabic Literature — Qur'ān, Hadith, classical & modern texts, traditional poetry
Conversational Arabic — Based on the Leap to Speak series
prerequisites: The ability to read basic Arabic text, or a strong desire to learn and improve these skills.
